title: Evangelion Blu Ray bootleg
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Blu-Ray bootleg?             Quote Post by Denothorm » Mon Dec 24, 2018 11:27 pm I was scouring the web for Evangelion merch to see about picking up when I ran into a couple listings of this Blu-ray set. It looks very professional, but I cannot find a release listed anywhere that it matches. I have found it on a couple sites, but I have a sneaking suspicion this is a bootleg. I am hoping it isn't as this set looks spectacular in my opinion, and I would love to have it on my shelf. Has anyone seen this set before, or are my fears founded? https://www.bonanza.com/listings/Neon-G ... gL3cvD_BwE

[]: Re: Evangelion Blu-Ray bootleg?             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Dec 25, 2018 6:08 am It's a bootleg, the only existing BD release of NGE is the Japanese.

[]: Re: Evangelion Blu-Ray bootleg?             Quote Post by Denothorm » Thu Dec 27, 2018 5:26 pm I thought so, thanks for the reply. I thought it seemed to good to be true. : D

[]: Re: Evangelion Blu-Ray bootleg?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 07, 2019 10:13 am The "Gainax 20th Anniversary" thing is pretty hilarious. (Gainax lost the rights to Eva years ago.)
